faqs.question: What pantry pests are common in Throgs Neck homes?
faqs.answer: Throgs Neck residents commonly encounter Indian meal moths, cigarette beetles, flour beetles, and weevils. These pests infest dry goods like cereals, flour, pasta, spices, and pet food. Our inspection identifies the specific pest species and all infested products to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to pantry pest problems in Throgs Neck?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service throughout Throgs Neck and the surrounding Bronx area. Our team understands that pantry pests multiply quickly, so we prioritize rapid response to prevent infestations from spreading throughout your kitchen and contaminating more food products.

faqs.question: What does your pantry pest control service include?
faqs.answer: Our $350–$550 service includes a thorough kitchen inspection, identification of all infested items, targeted treatment of affected areas, removal of contaminated products, pheromone traps for monitoring, and preventive recommendations. We also inspect adjacent areas like basements and storage rooms where pests may hide.

faqs.question: How can I prevent pantry pests from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: Store dry goods in airtight containers, regularly clean pantry shelves and cracks, check grocery items before storing, rotate older products to the front, and maintain proper ventilation. We provide detailed prevention tips specific to your Throgs Neck home and offer follow-up inspections to ensure long-term protection.
